name: PrivadoVPN
tagline: Best budget VPN with generous free tier
description: PrivadoVPN offers a generous free plan with 10GB monthly data and affordable premium plans, making it an excellent entry-level VPN.
longDescription: PrivadoVPN is a relatively new player in the VPN market but has quickly earned a spot on our list thanks to its generous free tier and competitive pricing. Based in Switzerland with strong privacy protections, PrivadoVPN offers a clean, simple experience that prioritizes ease of use. The free plan provides 10GB of data per month (significantly more than most free VPNs) and access to 12 server locations. Paid plans unlock unlimited data, all server locations, and up to 10 simultaneous connections. While the feature set isn't as extensive as premium competitors, PrivadoVPN covers the essentials well: strong encryption, a kill switch, and reliable streaming performance.
pros: SOCKS5 proxy included with all plans
cons: Smaller server network than established competitors

keyFeatures.name: Free Plan
keyFeatures.description: 10GB of free data monthly with access to 12 server locations. No credit card required. Includes AES-256 encryption and kill switch.

keyFeatures.name: SOCKS5 Proxy
keyFeatures.description: Built-in SOCKS5 proxy included with all plans — ideal for torrenting and bypassing geo-restrictions without encrypting all traffic.

keyFeatures.name: Split Tunneling
keyFeatures.description: Choose which apps route through the VPN tunnel and which use your regular connection. Available on Windows and Android.

keyFeatures.name: Streaming Support
keyFeatures.description: Reliable access to Netflix, Hulu, BBC iPlayer, and Amazon Prime Video. Dedicated streaming servers available on premium plans.

verdict: PrivadoVPN is the best choice for budget-conscious users who want a straightforward VPN without unnecessary complexity. The free tier is generous enough for light use, and the paid plans are competitively priced. While it lacks the advanced features of premium competitors, it covers the essentials well and is particularly strong for streaming and torrenting.

faqs.question: How much data does PrivadoVPN's free plan include?
faqs.answer: The free plan includes 10GB of data per month, which is generous compared to most free VPNs that typically offer 500MB-2GB. This is enough for approximately 10 hours of SD streaming or 5 hours of HD streaming. The free plan also includes access to 12 server locations across 10 countries.

faqs.question: Is PrivadoVPN safe for torrenting?
faqs.answer: Yes. PrivadoVPN supports P2P traffic on all premium servers and includes a SOCKS5 proxy for faster downloads. The kill switch ensures your real IP address is never exposed even if the VPN connection drops. The no-logs policy means your torrenting activity is not recorded.

awards.label: Best Budget VPN 2026
awards.description: Excellent value with generous free tier

author.name: Alex Chen
author.title: Senior Cybersecurity Analyst
author.bio: Alex has tested over 50 VPN services across 5 years at TrueTopReviews. He holds CISSP and CEH certifications.
